$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.6 — patch: network-level failures (a dropped connection, the server restarting, or a stale browser bundle) now show an actionable "Couldn't reach the server — reload the page" message instead of a raw "Failed to fetch"; and the Provision "Mode A" (generate script) flow now signals completion — the Apply step green-ticks, a Next steps card guides download → paste → adopt in Onboard, and a Done button returns to Devices. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
